diagrams.title: Half Adder Circuit Diagram
diagrams.description: Gate-level circuit diagram of a half adder showing XOR gate for Sum output and AND gate for Carry output, with inputs A and B. This visual representation helps students understand how binary addition is performed at the logic gate level.
diagrams.purpose: Explains how a half adder performs binary addition using XOR and AND gates to produce Sum and Carry bits

diagrams.title: Full Adder Circuit Diagram
diagrams.description: Gate-level circuit diagram of a full adder showing three inputs (A, B, Cin) and two outputs (Sum, Cout). The diagram displays XOR gates, AND gates, and OR gate interconnected to implement the full adder logic.
diagrams.purpose: Explains how a full adder handles carry-in and produces sum and carry-out for multi-bit binary addition

diagrams.title: Full Adder from Two Half Adders
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing how a full adder is constructed using two half adders and one OR gate. This hierarchical view illustrates the modular design approach in digital logic design.
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates how complex adder circuits are built from simpler components, reinforcing modular design principles
